description:
The library `openssl` version `3.0.18` was detected in `Anaconda package manager` located at `/root/miniconda3/envs/py39/conda-meta/openssl-3.0.18-hd6dcaed_0.json` and is vulnerable to `CVE-2025-15467`, which exists in versions `>= 3.0.0, < 3.0.19`.

The vulnerability was found in the [National Vulnerability Database (NVD)](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-15467) with vendor severity: `Critical`.

This vulnerability has a known exploit available. Source: [VulnCheck](https://github.com/balgan/CVE-2025-15467).

The vulnerability can be remediated by updating the library to version `3.0.19` or higher, using `conda update openssl`.
